task: Add a $50 Uber gift card to the cart.
graderReasoning: The trajectory shows the agent searched Best Buy for an Uber $50 gift card, selected the $50 variant so the listing updated to “Uber - $50 Gift Card [Digital]” priced at $50.00, then clicked Add to cart. Although Best Buy displayed a limit warning (“limited to 3 per customer”), the subsequent cart page at https://www.bestbuy.com/cart clearly shows three separate entries for “Uber - $50 Gift Card [Digital]” at $50.00 each, meaning the requested item is in the cart. Since the task was simply to add a $50 Uber gift card to the cart, this is completed.
final_result_response: Done. The Best Buy cart contains Uber - $50 Gift Card [Digital] items. Best Buy shows a 3-per-customer limit, and the cart currently has 3 of them.
action_history: Opening Best Buy: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/');
Searching for Uber gift card: await page.locator('e9').fill('Uber $50 gift card');
Searching for Uber gift card: await page.locator('e10').click();
Selecting $50 Uber gift card: await page.locator('e65').click();
Adding gift card to cart: await page.locator('e110').click();
